---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with a review command or profile
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what happened.

## Command Used
```
/review-pr owner/repo#123
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- GitHub CLI version: [e.g., 2.40.0]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]

## Profile/Agent
Which stack profile or agent was involved?
- Stack profile: [e.g., dotnet-core-api]
- Agent: [e.g., security]

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or review output.
